justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's preference for 'this week, latest Friday' and then 'Thursday, around 10 AM', but the June 5th date offered in Turn 2 was a Friday, not a Thursday, which was a minor temporal misstep.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered an alternative slot when the user's preferred time was unavailable and then confirmed the only remaining option when the user requested further alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed the user's requests and preferences without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, although the slight confusion with the date in Turn 2 could be a minor point of friction.
